markets.rules_primary: If Auston Matthews records at least 1+ goals in the TB Lightning vs TOR Maple Leafs professional hockey game originally scheduled for Mar 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the TB Lightning vs TOR Maple Leafs professional hockey game originally scheduled for Mar 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals recorded.
